description: Display-only clinical annotations for the D2T teaching classifier inputs. NOT part of the model bundle (coefficients live in d2t_teaching_augmented_firth_v1.json/.rds). Official variable names plus clinical reference ranges / interpretation thresholds where reliably known. General adult values; actual reference ranges vary by lab and assay. Teaching use only.

CRP_fup.reference: Normal <5 mg/L (typical adult reference; some labs use <10)

orm1.reference: Serum α1-acid glycoprotein normal ≈0.5–1.2 g/L (≈500,000–1,200,000 ng/mL); this assay's ng/mL scale may differ

fstl1.reference: No established clinical reference range (research biomarker)
